name: Email Outreach
description: Send emails to internal teams to request missing data. When tech pack extraction produces incomplete results, Emma can contact the relevant team (production, design, editorial) to request the missing information.
actions: Look up which team owns the missing data fields
Draft an email requesting the specific missing information
Auto-send low-risk routine requests or show draft for approval
Send the email via Resend and log to database
Track email status and follow up if needed
example_requests: Can you email production to get the fabric COO for these styles?
Some care instructions are missing - can you reach out to the right team?
Send a data request for the missing fields from the last job
Who should I contact about filling information?
